Land2Living — Resale Offer Form

Buyer's offer to purchase a listed stand or property

Paper Ref: OFR-____-____-___
Date: ________________________

1. Listing Reference

2. Buyer Information

3. Offer Details

4. Buyer Declaration

I, the undersigned, confirm that this offer is genuine and that I have the means to complete this purchase. I understand that the council must approve the transfer and that a commission of up to 2.5% may be added to the purchase price for the platform fee.

Buyer signature & date
Council witness signature & date

5. Seller Response

Seller to complete one of the following:

☐  Accepted — I accept this offer as presented
☐  Rejected — Reason:
☐  Counter-offer — New amount: R
Seller signature & date
Council witness signature & date
